nodes.name: community_access_schema.sql
nodes.summary: Free-tier + token-unlock + subscription gating schema. Defines user_community_unlocks and user_subscriptions tables with RLS, plus RPCs get_community_access, unlock_community (2 free, 10 tokens each), activate_subscription.

nodes.name: user_community_unlocks
nodes.summary: Tracks which communities a user has unlocked (free slot or token spend). PK (user_id, community_id).

nodes.name: user_subscriptions
nodes.summary: Per-user subscription status with expiry. PK user_id; status defaults to 'inactive'.

nodes.name: get_community_access
nodes.summary: RPC returning {has_subscription, unlocked_community_ids[]} for a user.

nodes.name: unlock_community
nodes.summary: RPC unlocking a community: free if <2 unlocks or active sub, else debits 10 tokens from users.token_balance. Returns {ok, already, free, balance, error}.

nodes.name: activate_subscription
nodes.summary: RPC upserting user_subscriptions to 'active' with expiry now()+p_months months.

nodes.name: config.toml
nodes.summary: Supabase CLI project configuration: api, db (pooler, migrations, seed), realtime, studio, inbucket, storage (s3, analytics, vector), auth (rate_limit, email, sms, mfa, external providers, third_party, oauth_server), edge_runtime, analytics, experimental.

nodes.name: full_schema_deploy.sql
nodes.summary: All-in-one deployment script: full schema (15 public tables: users, polls, poll_options, poll_votes, poll_comments, communities, community_members, community_messages, community_requests, community_waitlist, avatar_catalog, user_avatar_inventory, user_avatar_selection, daily_spin_pool, landing_new_avatars), indexes, RPCs (handle_new_user, signup_user, login_user, toggle_message_like, join_community_waitlist, set_updated_at_avatar_catalog, trim_community_messages), storage bucket setup, plus inline seed inserts.

nodes.name: schema.sql
nodes.summary: Canonical schema (no seeds): 15 public tables (users, polls, poll_options, poll_votes, poll_comments, communities, community_members, community_messages, community_requests, community_waitlist, avatar_catalog, user_avatar_inventory, user_avatar_selection, daily_spin_pool, landing_new_avatars), indexes, RLS policies, extensions (pgcrypto, pg_cron), RPCs (handle_new_user trigger, signup_user, login_user, toggle_message_like, join_community_waitlist, set_updated_at_avatar_catalog, trim_community_messages), storage buckets.

nodes.name: seed.sql
nodes.summary: Seed data: inserts into communities, polls, and poll_options for initial app content.

nodes.name: xp_schema.sql
nodes.summary: XP/leveling schema: user_progress and user_xp_claims tables with RLS, plus RPCs _xp_to_level, get_user_progress, award_xp, award_xp_once (idempotent by claim_key), get_user_xp_claim_keys. Mirrors client LEVEL_THRESHOLDS.

nodes.name: user_progress
nodes.summary: Per-user XP, level, total_polls_answered, streak_days. PK user_id.

nodes.name: user_xp_claims
nodes.summary: Idempotency ledger for XP awards. PK (user_id, source, claim_key).

nodes.name: _xp_to_level
nodes.summary: Immutable SQL helper mapping XP to level (1-10) using thresholds 500/1500/3500/7000/12000/19000/28000/38000/50000.

nodes.name: get_user_progress
nodes.summary: RPC returning user_progress row (upserts default if missing).

nodes.name: award_xp
nodes.summary: RPC adding XP and recomputing level. Returns {xp, level, leveled_up}.

nodes.name: award_xp_once
nodes.summary: Idempotent XP award keyed by (user_id, source, claim_key). No-op on duplicate.

nodes.name: get_user_xp_claim_keys
nodes.summary: RPC returning TEXT[] of claim_keys for a user and source.
